step_by_step_thinking: I agree with agent1’s assessment. Since the Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) depends on multiple interrelated factors such as arterial resistance affecting blood supply and pressure within the glomerulus itself, having all three aspects—afferent, efferent arteriolar resistances, and intraglomerular pressure—included under 'All' makes sense for fully capturing its determination. Therefore, my answer remains D.
